scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 13 (Surat Maryam).

terms.english: to include it among the counted verses
terms.note: A technical phrasing used when the commentator explains that a given enumerator treats a phrase as part of the recognized verse count.
Used to mark that all the counting authorities agree on the ruling for a given occurrence.

terms.english: the disputed places; the loci of disagreement
terms.note: The standard phrase for the words or phrase-endings in a surah over which the counting traditions differ.
